name: @colonelpanic8/subtr-actor
description: WebAssembly bindings for subtr-actor - Rocket League replay processing and analysis

scripts.build: npm exec -- wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg && node ./scripts/prepare-wasm-package.mjs
scripts.build:nodejs: npm exec -- wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node
scripts.build:bundler: npm exec -- wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg-bundler
scripts.pack: node --run=build && env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm pack pkg/
scripts.publish: node --run=build && env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm publish pkg/

author: Ivan Malison <ivanmalison@gmail.com>
